evals.prompt: Create a new skill that triages GitHub PR review comments and proposes actionable fixes.
evals.expected_output: A valid skill folder with SKILL.md, clear triggers, and a basic eval set.

evals.prompt: Improve an existing dashboard-writing skill because it under-triggers and produces inconsistent outputs.
evals.expected_output: Revised description and tightened output format guidance with evaluation plan.

evals.prompt: Benchmark the old and new versions of a skill and summarize quality, latency, token usage, and variance.
evals.expected_output: Comparable benchmark summary with clear deltas and next iteration actions.
